title: hariota platycarpa
intro: Hariota platycarpa, also known as the Himalayan yam, is a type of plant that belongs to the Dioscoreaceae family and is native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Hariota platycarpa include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in digestion. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also consumed as a raw tuber in some parts of the world.
